name: atxp-dev/atxp
description: Agent identity platform. One command (`npx atxp@latest agent register`) gives your AI agent a USDC wallet (Base), @atxp.email inbox, phone number, and 100+ paid MCP tools including web search, image gen, SMS, voice calls, and 100+ LLM models. Self-registers without human login. $5 free credits. Works with Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP client.
